channel.title: La Cyber Sphère — Bulletin de veille cyber
channel.description: Alertes critiques et élevées, résumées et sourcées.

item.title: [Faible] Hackers abuse ViPNet software to target Russian govt agencies
item.description: An advanced threat actor is abusing the update mechanism for the ViPNet private networking product suite to target Russian organizations, including government agencies. [...]

item.title: [Faible] UAC-0145 Uses ClickFix CAPTCHAs to Infect Ukrainian Devices wih Malware
item.description:
Russian state-sponsored threat actors have been observed leveraging the infamous ClickFix strategy to trick Ukrainian targets into infecting their own machines with data-stealing malware.
According to the Computer…

item.title: [Critique] SonicWall SMA Zero-Days Exploited Before Disclosure to Gain Root Access
item.description: A previously undocumented threat actor has been attributed to the exploitation of recently disclosed SonicWall Secure Mobile Access (SMA) 1000 series VPN appliances as zero-days prior their public disclosure since June…
